description:
Manually catalog three landmark technology court cases into your Zotero library using the 'Case' item type. Create these items from scratch (do not import) and ensure all legal citation metadata matches the values provided below exactly.

1. Google LLC v. Oracle America, Inc.
   - Court: U.S. Supreme Court
   - Date Decided: 2021-04-05
   - Docket Number: 18-956
   - Reporter: S. Ct.
   - Reporter Volume: 141
   - First Page: 1183

2. Sony Corp. of America v. Universal City Studios, Inc.
   - Court: U.S. Supreme Court
   - Date Decided: 1984-01-17
   - Docket Number: 81-1687
   - Reporter: U.S.
   - Reporter Volume: 464
   - First Page: 417

3. Authors Guild, Inc. v. Google, Inc.
   - Court: U.S. Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit
   - Date Decided: 2015-10-16
   - Docket Number: 13-4829
   - Reporter: F.3d
   - Reporter Volume: 804
   - First Page: 202

targets.title: Google LLC v. Oracle America, Inc.
Sony Corp. of America v. Universal City Studios, Inc.
Authors Guild, Inc. v. Google, Inc.
targets.court: U.S. Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit
